payload.answer: Durably remember the architecture roles: Brain DB as source of truth, Cognee as rebuildable semantic projection, and Slack as strict memory intake agent. Keep Telegram addition and cheapest-highest-performance model choice as open questions.
payload.decision: Store only the current architectural guidance as durable memory: Brain DB is the source of truth; Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection; Slack is a strict memory intake agent. Leave Telegram and model-selection questions unresolved.

entity_resolution.reason: No ambiguous entity required resolution from the provided summary.

payload.intent: Compile durable memory from a chat summary about Brain architecture and unresolved questions.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for memory.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection rather than the source of truth.
Slack should act as a strict memory intake agent.
It is still open whether Telegram should be added later.
It is still open which model is cheapest while saturating performance.

details: Stored 2 open questions without prematurely resolving them.
Avoided marking any unresolved item as decided.

repair_options: If later guidance changes, supersede the system-role cards for Brain DB, Cognee, or Slack rather than retaining older wording.
If Telegram is decided, add a new durable memory card only after explicit confirmation.
If a model benchmark or cost decision is made, replace the open-question card with the selected model and rationale.
